name: Abel Heylon
description: Duke of the North. He's Siegren's mentor and Fiona's benefactor. Though cold to outsiders, he shows a much warmer side of him to his allies, and especially Fiona, whom he regards as his daughter, even insisting on her calling him "father". ~!During the events in the capital, he gains Fiona's consent in adopting her as his heir, thus giving the Heylon name to her!~

name: Akane Ryuuzouji
description: She is Reito's assigned nurse. Akane is a tall woman (taller than Reito Mizuhara) with vermilion hair that is tied in a ponytail where it is styled in ringlets at the bottom with bangs hanging on the right side. She has droopy eyes with blue irises and an hourglass physique, though muscular, with her most prominent feature being her very large breasts. Akane is very sexually confident and laid-back, having seemingly no reservations in terms of showing off her nude body or even engaging in sexual

name: Alphard Al Sheya
nativeName: アルファルド・アル・シュヤ
description: The series' most prominent villain, Alphard is an attractive young woman who is both the leader of a terrorist organization called Snake and Canaan's arch-enemy. She appears easily capable of taking down Canaan even though the latter uses her synesthesia, reasoning that she is no longer manipulated by feelings unlike Canaan. She carries a FN Five-seveN USG as a sidearm. (Source: Wikipedia)
searchTerms: アルファルド・アル・シュヤ

name: Ayame Shaga
description: You's half-Italian first cousin who is an avid gamer and will often use her wily ways to get him to do what she wants. She is also a bento brawler known as the Beauty by the Lake after eating a bento on a bench at a park next to a lake and ended up falling asleep there. She's well known for using chopsticks in battle. She often goes scouting out other bento brawlers and usually hangs out with Yō and Sen. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Dali
description: Assuming the identity of a boy named Hitori, he and his brother Migi are adopted by the middle-aged couple, Mr. and Mrs. Sonoyama. He can be described as logical and precise. Dali is the twin most focused on his vengeance and instructs Migi to act stealthily like a good boy, but at times, he can lose his composure. Dali is highly protective of Migi; if anyone messes with Migi, Dali may resort to violent methods.
mediaTitles: The Timeless Collection of Arts from “Migi & Dali”

name: Dunn Smith
description: Dunn Smith looks to be a man in his thirties, with light brown hair, a straight nose, and sharp gray eyes. Klein Moretti described his eyes as "like a lake in an ancient forest that no one visited, giving him an indescribable sense of depth". He also has an receding Hairline despite his young Age. Dunn Smith is the captain of the Nighthawks, a division under the Church of the Evernight Goddess, in Tingen City diocese. He is a Sequence 7 Beyonder of the Darkness Pathway but has the power not too

name: Eleanora Hillrose
nativeName: エレノーラ・ヒルローズ
description: Eleanora is the daughter of Duke Hillrose, the leader of the radical nobles part of the anti-king faction. She has a crush on [Prince Edwin](https://anilist.co/character/313858/Edwin-Valschein) and tries to keep the women around him in check. She initially comes across as a stuck-up villainess type, but is actually just a naive lovestruck girl. name: Fuu Sawatari
description: A curious, happy but somewhat weird and clumsy girl who has a fondness of taking photos. She got this fondness from her father, who passed away around 5 years ago.

name: Gracia Ul Naga Saillune
description: Naga the Serpent is Lina's rival and companion through the first four movies and both OVAs. She acts as a constant annoyance for Lina due to the fact that she is more, eh... well endowed, and she never lets poor Lina forget it. She is a very powerful sorceress, but faints at the sight of blood and is quite clumsy. She is extremely passionate about yosakoi dancing after having seen a performance from when she visited Japan in the past. name: Helen
description: Number 22 in Clare's generation, Helen's specialty is attacking her enemies with her stretching arms, giving her a surprisingly long range of attack, as well as the ability to constrict the enemy. Hot tempered and aggressive, Helen mocked Clare because of her rank when she joined the hunting party, but she eventually grew to respect her later on.

name: Inutade
description: __Height:__ 195 cm (6'5") Inutade is a member of Shuro's party, serving him as one of his retainers. She is an ogre from the Eastern Archipelago. Compared to her comrades in Shuro's group, Tade is carefree, friendly, rather simple-minded, and gets hungry easily. Her real name is Hijouhi (ヒジョウヒ). She seems to have been close with Izutsumi.
mediaTitles: Delicious in Dungeon: The Adventurer's Bible

name: Karin
description: Karin is a Senbyou who has lived at the top of Karin Tower for more than 800 years. The tower is located right underneath Kami's Lookout, which is a few hundred meters[verification needed] higher than Karin's tower and can be reached by Son Goku's nyoi-bō. Karin is a deity just below the rank of Kami, and plays a large role in Dragon Ball when he trains Goku during the Commander Red Saga to defeat Tao Pai Pai. name: Kazuma Ikezawa
description: A 13 year old Oz user and one of Natsuki's cousins. On Oz, he is known as King Kazma. He is famous on there for being an excellent fighter in the Martial Arts Championship. He refers to Oz's fighting games as not being a game, but a sport. He says that he 'likes the fighting and winning, but not the gaming part.' name: Kent
description: University graduate and best friends with Ikki. He likes making math puzzles and observing things. He likes every single type of animal, because he likes to observe them all. His symbolic route in the game is the 'Clover'. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kibana
description: Kibana is the eighth and final Gym Leader of the Galar League, and he is recognized as the strongest Gym Leader in Galar. He is also the self-proclaimed rival of [Dande](https://anilist.co/character/159780/Dande), and despite a losing streak of 0 to 10 against him, he is the only person who has come close to beating him, having managed to knock out more of Dande's Pokémon than anyone else. name: Kobori
description: The fairy of earth of the fairies of Elementario. She usually has a stoic demeanor and has shown interest in BL.

name: Kon Tatsumi
description: __Height:__ 158cm A straight-laced girl who specializes in kokkuri fortune telling. Due to the way she wears her ribbon, she is often thought to be a fox girl.
